TextView.android:text: Read first: configure vehicle model & permissions
On first install, grant all required permissions
Select vehicle model to match camera layout
Select the encoding mode for video recording
Set video resolution and recording bitrate
Apply scale/translation correction to main preview
Apply fisheye correction to preview (does not affect recording)
Does not affect photo capture or DingTalk commands
Select storage location for videos and photos
Auto-delete oldest files when limit exceeded (blank/0 = unlimited)
Deletes an extra 20% when cleaning (e.g., 10GB limit cleans down to 8GB)
Show recording time and segment count at top-right (double tap to toggle)
Add timestamp watermark to top-left of saved videos/photos (video watermark only works in MediaCodec mode).
Run app automatically after system boot
Automatically start recording when app launches and keep recording (long recording may consume significant performance).
When enabled, continue recording when screen is off; otherwise stop after 10s and resume 10s after screen on.
Wake every 15 minutes to keep process active
Prevent deep system sleep; can receive messages after power-off (higher power usage)
Show floating record button; tap to open app
Press custom key to wake/exit EVCam preview when speed exceeds threshold (Longying-1 only)

• Permission Settings: manage required app permissions
• Vehicle Configuration: choose the matching model for camera layout
• Recording Mode: - Auto: selects best option based on vehicle model - MediaRecorder: uses system hardware encoder - MediaCodec: software encoding mode
• Segment Duration: set max length of each video segment - 1 min: smaller files, easier to share - 3 min: balance between size and continuity - 5 min: fewer files
• Storage Location: - Internal: /DCIM/EVCam_Video/ - USB: USB/DCIM/ (permission required) - Selecting USB enables relay writing (write to internal first, then async transfer to USB after segment split)
• Auto Storage Cleanup: - Set separate limits for videos and photos - Auto-check 30s after cold start and hourly - Deletes oldest files when over limit (blank or 0 = unlimited)
• Recording Status Display: - Shows timer and segment count at top-right while recording - Double tap to quickly show/hide
• Timestamp Watermark: - Add time watermark to top-left of saved videos/photos - Affects saved files only, not preview - Video watermark supports MediaCodec only
• Auto Start on Boot: run automatically after system boot
• Auto-start Recording: - Starts recording when app launches - Restores recording when returning from background - Works with foreground service to avoid interruption
• Screen-off Recording (parked): - Available only when auto-start recording is enabled - ON: continue recording when screen is off - OFF: stop 10s after screen off - Resume 10s after screen on
• Scheduled Keep-alive: wake every 15 minutes
• Prevent Sleep: block deep system sleep - Can still receive remote messages after power off - Increases battery usage, enable as needed
• Floating Window: shows floating record button
